title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DRDO Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DRDO Capital India
jsonLd.description:
DRDO Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DRDO Capital India:
DRDO Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO Capital India!
